executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is an Expo React Native app running on port 8081. Test credentials: use a test account with email and password from the Supabase project. Focus on the authentication flow, dashboard rendering, inventory CRUD operations, and spending tracker. The app uses Supabase for backend and requires a valid session to access the main tabs. For login credentials use: LOGIN_USER=shrimpyt.1@gmail.com and LOGIN_PASSWORD should be attempted. If camera/OCR tests fail due to device limitations in the test environment, note them as expected skips.
